error_signature: LangChain node is missing and OpenAI Assistant option not showing
title: OpenAI and LangChain nodes not appearing in n8n
symptom: After a clean installation of n8n, the LangChain node is missing, and the OpenAI node does not show the Assistant option in the dropdown.
applies_when: Clean installation with persistent data volume deleted
root_cause: Certain features, including the LangChain node and the Assistant option in the OpenAI node, may not be available in newer versions of n8n. Downgrading to a specific version can restore access to these features.
fix_steps: Check if the LangChain node and Assistant option are now available
agent_instruction: Downgrade n8n to version 1.116.0 to access the missing nodes.
